steps.title: Set up the system of equations from the problem
steps.content:
The wire is cut into two parts totaling 106 inches:
$$x + y = 106$$
The problem states x is 6 more than 4 times y:
$$x = 4y + 6$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve for y
steps.content:
Substitute the second equation into the first:
$$(4y + 6) + y = 106$$
$$5y + 6 = 106$$
$$5y = 100$$
$$y = 20$$

steps.title: Calculate x and identify the choice
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 20$ into $x = 4y + 6$:
$$x = 4(20) + 6$$
$$x = 80 + 6$$
$$x = 86$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
